revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-265

For any given reference point on the antenna, the power radiated by the antenna divided by the mean square value of the current at the reference point.


Note: The reference point is usually the feed point or a current antinode. It should always be specified.

Reference: B.S. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
